'''Fleet Group Three''' was one of three major [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] in service with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] at the time of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. Commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] from the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Mon Mothma (Imperial-class)|''Mon Mothma'']], it was to be the hammer to the anvil of [[Fleet Group One|Fleet Groups One]] and [[Fleet Group Two|Two]]. It suffered the fewest losses during the engagement due to General Antilles' reluctance to engage [[refugee ship]]s that were being forced to ram themselves against [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet]]. Thousands of his ships defected to General [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis's]] Fleet Group Two as a result of their fleet commander's refusal to engage.

When a retreat was called at Coruscant, a vanguard force from Fleet Group Three jumped to [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] and managed to rout the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] occupational force, retaking the planet for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Antilles planned to make that [[Planet/Legends|world]] a temporary haven for the billions of refugees fleeing the galactic capital, but the self-declared [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Pwoe]] and the rest of the [[New Republic Advisory Council|Advisory Council]] followed the fleet to Borleias and ordered General Antilles to remain on-world indefinitely in order to harass the Vong. In reality, Pwoe wanted Antilles and his fleet to sacrifice themselves, thus giving him time to prepare for a formal surrender to the Vong. Antilles saw right through the rogue [[Senator/Legends|Senator's]] plans and managed to blackmail him into allowing the rest of Fleet Group Three and the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' to join him at Borleias.

Although ''Lusankya'' managed to destroy one of the Yuuzhan Vong battle groups that had been sent to subdue the Republic at Borleias, it and Fleet Group Three were besieged for months by an even larger force led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Czulkang Lah]], father of the current [[Warmaster]], [[Tsavong Lah|Tsavong]]. The [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]] ended with Fleet Group Three's complete withdrawal, but only after the destruction of Czulkang Lah's [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] and the majority of the Vong fleet. Afterward, the fleet was reorganized due to attrition, merging with the [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third Battle Group]] and bearing the redesignation of [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third Fleet]] as part of the newly-formed [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]].
